fixtures.description: Open a hyperlink span, write linked text, close the span, then write plain text.
fixtures.source: Common OSC 8 behavior, cross-checked against Rio hyperlink tests.

fixtures.description: Query the clipboard using the c clipboard designator.
fixtures.source: OSC 52 clipboard query syntax.

fixtures.description: Read text/plain, begin a text/plain write, send a no-op alias for text/plain, send text/plain data, then finish the write.
fixtures.source: Kitty rich clipboard protocol uses OSC 5522 metadata and base64 payload packets.

fixtures.description: Query foreground, set background, reset cursor, and query an unsupported keyed color.
fixtures.source: Kitty keyed color protocol and Ghostty OSC 21 parser behavior.

fixtures.description: Set a pointer shape, push two shapes, then query support for one valid and one invalid shape.
fixtures.source: Kitty pointer shapes protocol.

fixtures.description: Mark prompt start, input start, output start, and command end.
fixtures.source: Ghostty semantic_prompt parser supports A, B, C, D command markers.

fixtures.description: Render URL-safe UTF-8 text at scale 2.
fixtures.source: Ghostty kitty_text_sizing parser test accepts 66;s=2;<payload>.

fixtures.description: Display a simple Kitty desktop notification with no metadata.
fixtures.source: Kitty desktop notification protocol uses OSC 99 metadata and payload.

fixtures.description: Query current Kitty keyboard protocol mode.
fixtures.source: Rio handler dispatches CSI ? u to report_keyboard_mode.

fixtures.description: Set all Kitty keyboard progressive enhancement flags, then query the active flags.
fixtures.source: Kitty keyboard protocol progressive enhancement uses CSI = flags ; mode u and CSI ? u.

fixtures.description: Push disambiguation mode, union report-all-keys, query, pop one stack entry, then query again.
fixtures.source: Kitty keyboard protocol stack management uses CSI > flags u and CSI < number u.

fixtures.description: Request three lines of Kitty unscrolling with CSI 3 + T.
fixtures.source: Kitty unscrolling protocol uses CSI n + T to pan down while filling from scrollback.

fixtures.description: Query support, set a follow-main cursor, query cursor state, set extra cursor colors, query colors, then clear all extra cursors.
fixtures.source: Kitty multiple cursors protocol uses CSI > ... SP q with shape, coordinate, color, support, state, and color query operations.

fixtures.description: Write two short rows, enable rectangular attribute changes, then apply RGB foreground, indexed background, and bold SGR to a 2x3 rectangle.
fixtures.source: Kitty DECCARA extension uses CSI top;left;bottom;right;SGR... $ r and commonly brackets the operation with DECSACE CSI 2 * x / CSI * x.

fixtures.description: Start an OSC 5113 send session that must be denied until the approval UI and filesystem policy are implemented.
fixtures.source: Kitty file transfer commands use OSC 5113 ; key=value ... ST, with ac=send starting remote-to-terminal transfer sessions.

fixtures.description: Transmit and place a 1x1 RGBA red pixel image.
fixtures.source: Kitty graphics APC G transmit/place shape; behavior must be verified against real terminals.

fixtures.description: Minimal DCS sixel payload that exercises the sixel parser path.
fixtures.source: Sixel DCS q introducer with a tiny payload.

fixtures.description: Begin synchronized update, write two lines, then end synchronized update.
fixtures.source: Rio parser recognizes exact CSI ? 2026 h/l sequences.

fixtures.description: Query terminal version using CSI > q.
fixtures.source: Rio handler dispatches CSI > q to report_version.

fixtures.description: Query the RGB terminfo capability using DCS + q RGB-in-hex.
fixtures.source: Rio tests use DCS + q 524742 as the RGB XTGETTCAP request.
